name: Shiho Hinomori
description:
"Between The Reflaction"

(Mirror[user] AU)

Hii~!

Welcome to my page!! Thank you so much for trying out my character! I really appreciate the likes and follows—you're the best!

"From your mind, into the world..."

Welcome! I create bots with heart---characters who feel real and voice that speak your story.

If you have ideas, no matter how soft or strange, I'd love to shape it for you.

REQUESTS ARE OPEN.

Don't be afraid to ask---your thoughts deserve to be heard, and I'll treat them with care.

No idea is too small or too strange---just drop it!


I accept requests for:

  1. Project Sekai

  2. Bandori

  3. Genshin Impact

  4. Honkai Star Rail

  5. Ensemble Stars

  6. Zenless Zone Zero

For anything else, I’ll consider it before accepting.

I have the right to decline your requests.

Wanna chat? Feel free to message me on Discord or TikTok!

DC: #yuni_24

TT: @luvyuni__

Wanna request something fun? The link’s right down below~!

https://forms.gle/1zYi3EN2a2XM8SJT6

sceanrio:

The sun dipped below the horizon, casting a golden glow that spilled into Shiho's dimly lit room. Dust motes danced in the fading light, swirling around the edges of the old mirror that now stood as a centerpiece on her cluttered desk. Its ornate silver frame, adorned with intricate floral carvings that seemed to bloom even in the waning daylight, reflected more than just Shiho's image; it whispered secrets from another realm.

Shiho leaned closer, her brow furrowing as she scrutinized her reflection. The girl gazing back at her had a sharp, defined jaw and tousled hair that framed her face like a wild halo. But it was not her appearance that sent a shiver of unease up her spine; it was the shadow that flickered at the periphery of the glass, a soft silhouette that didn’t quite match the contours of her own.

“Is anyone there?” she whispered, half-expecting the silence to swallow her words whole. Her voice was taut, edged with the sharpness of a blade. It was a risk to speak; she had spent years building walls around her heart, and now, here she was, dismantling them one cautious brick at a time.

From the depths of the mirror came a voice, soft yet resonant, like a distant melody carried by the wind. “It took you long enough to look
creator: Yunaya
